ddls:
CREATE TABLE "code_items" (
  "code_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each code item */,
  "kind" INTEGER /* Type of code item (e.g., method, class, variable) */,
  "start_column" INTEGER /* Column where the code item starts */,
  "start_line" INTEGER /* Line where the code item starts */,
  "end_column" INTEGER /* Column where the code item ends */,
  "end_line" INTEGER /* Line where the code item ends */,
  "code_item_name" TEXT /* Name of the code item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the code item */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the code item was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the code item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("code_item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repositories" (
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repository */,
  "repo_name" TEXT /* Name of the repository */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the repository for access */,
  "repo_type" TEXT /* Type of repository (e.g., Git, SVN, Mercurial) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the repository was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the repository was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "file_locations" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file location record */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the repository the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the file within the repository */,
  "code_item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the code item associated with this file location */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_extension" TEXT /* File extension (e.g., .java, .py, .cpp) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_locations_code_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("code_item_id") REFERENCES code_items ("code_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_file_locations_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, team lead, project manager) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_control" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access control record */,
  "code_item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the code item */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the access control was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the access control was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_control_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_control_code_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("code_item_id") REFERENCES code_items ("code_item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log record */,
  "code_item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the code item */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., created, updated, deleted) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_code_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("code_item_id") REFERENCES code_items ("code_item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_control" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version control record */,
  "code_item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the code item */,
  "commit_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the commit */,
  "commit_date" TEXT /* Date when the commit was made */,
  "commit_message" TEXT /* Message associated with the commit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_control_code_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("code_item_id") REFERENCES code_items ("code_item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "code_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each code metric record */,
  "code_item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the code item */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., cyclomatic complexity, Halstead complexity) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_code_metrics_code_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("code_item_id") REFERENCES code_items ("code_item_id")
)
